title: Traditional British Yorkshire Pudding
description: A classic British dish often served with roasted meats. Yorkshire pudding is a simple, yet satisfying meal that is easy to prepare.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, salt, and a pinch of pepper.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, and a pinch of salt.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
5. Heat the beef drippings or oil in a 12-cup muffin tin in the oven for 5 minutes.
6. Pour the batter into the hot muffin tin and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown.
7. Serve hot with your favorite breakfast items, such as bacon, sausage, or black pudding.
